description: Style NoteA backpack easily distributes the weight across your shoulders and on your back, making the weight easy to carry while making you cool casually confident. Pair these trendy nike backpacks with your sportswear to the field and locker rooms.Product DetailsA black Sports backpack with an orange nike swoosh in front and orange embellishmentTwo adjustable padded backpack straps and padded back and one short handle on topDurable with water resistant tarpaulin bottomOne main compartment with a drawstring ball carrying internal compartmentOne small open compartment on the left sideMaterial and Care100% polyesterDo not machine wash or dry cleanDo not bleach or ironWipe with a damp cloth when necessary and line drySizeHeight: 50 cmWidth: 32 cmDepth: 19 cm
